svg.title: Hochschild Homology and Cohomology
svg.desc: A schematic placeholder showing the bar resolution of an associative algebra A as A tensor A tensor ... tensor A mapping to A, with the Hochschild complex M tensor A tensor n on the right and the cohomology of the resulting complex giving HH_n(A, M) and HH^n(A, M).

g.text: Bar resolution: ... → A⊗A⊗A⊗A → A⊗A⊗A → A⊗A → A
Hochschild complex C_n(A, M) = M ⊗ A^⊗n
Differential b: alternating sum of multiplications
